PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Camelia Mahmonudi appeared by telephone for Portland Grant (Petitioner).
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that the lost will dated August 16, 2001 is admitted to probate. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for June 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.
